text:
First, note time zones:  
Asia/Singapore is UTC+8 (historically, but for 1352, assume same offset as modern for this problem).  
Europe/Athens is UTC+2 (modern).  
Difference: UTC+8 to UTC+2 = 6 hours behind Athens relative to UTC.  
So Athens time = Singapore time − 6 hours.  

2:00 − 6 hours = previous day 20:00 (February 2, 1352).  

FINAL_ANSWER: 20:00, February 2, 1352
